name: Crackling Bubble Gum (Lesser)
description:
This tangy gum cracks and pops in your mouth as you chew it. While you're chewing crackling bubble gum, for up to 10 minutes, you have a +1 item bonus to saving throws against auditory and sonic effects.

Secondary Effect 2 (sonic)

Effect You blow a bubble with the gum until it pops, after which it becomes inert. The pop deals ] to all creatures in a with a save. A creature that fails its save is also bound with sticky gum, taking a –10-foot item penalty to its Speed for 1 minute. The creature can remove the gum with a total of 3 Interact actions. These actions don't have to be consecutive, and other creatures can provide the actions as well.
